enriched_expressions.definition: An alarm that signals a fault, abnormal condition, or failure in the auxiliary watering system of a manufacturing machine, typically indicating that the system is not delivering the required water flow or pressure for cooling, lubrication, or other process needs.

CAUSES: pump failure, valve blockage, sensor fault
REFERENCES: machine manual section on auxiliary watering
DETECTED_BY: water flow sensor, pressure sensor
